title: quercus ilex var. avellaniformis
intro: Quercus ilex var. avellaniformis, also known as the Holm Oak or Avellano, is a variety of the Holm Oak tree (Quercus ilex), native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its high content of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits of Quercus ilex var. avellaniformis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
